basic_details.job_title: DTU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Delhi Technological University (DTU) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://dtu.ac.in/. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the DTU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters in Zoology/ Botany/ Biotechnology/ Biochemistry/ Life Sciences (Minimum 55% marks)
qualification.details: Masters in Zoology/ Botany/ Biotechnology/ Biochemistry/ Life Sciences (Minimum 55% marks). Preference will be given to NET qualified candidates.

content_sections.heading: DTU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.delhi_technological_university_dtu: Masters in Zoology/ Botany/ Biotechnology/ Biochemistry/ Life Sciences (Minimum 55% marks)

content_sections.heading: DTU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the DTU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download DTU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Masters in Zoology/ Botany/ Biotechnology/ Biochemistry/ Life Sciences (Minimum 55% marks). Preference will be given to NET qualified candidates.

content_sections.heading: DTU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: DTU Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post being advertised by Delhi Technological University?
faq.answer: Delhi Technological University is recruiting for the post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF) on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Master's degree in Zoology, Botany, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, or Life Sciences with a minimum of 55% marks.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any preference given to certain candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates who have qualified for the NET examination.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/- plus 27% HRA.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 05 August 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Walk-in Interview venue?
faq.answer: The specific venue details for the Walk-in Interview will be available in the official notification.
